examples: I sometimes had to deputize for him in the kitchen.
Ms Green has asked me to deputize for her at the meeting.
Herr Schulmann cannot be here to welcome you and has asked me to deputize.
"Phil is familiar with the conditions and will be ideally placed to deputize for Matt should the situation arise, " said Graveney.
Both Rebecca and Matt will deputize for me across the full range of my responsibilities and will work closely together and with me in all our activities.
